title: Death Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Killing curse spider.gif|thumb|400px|Alastor Moody (Barty Crouch) demonstrating The Killing Curse]]

==Summary==
'''Death Manipulation''' is the ability to directly induce death in beings, objects or even concepts via supernatural means. This can manifest as the inexplicable death of an individual, the direct cessation of [[Biological Manipulation|biological functions]], dispersal of life force and more, being able to affect anything from [[Plant Manipulation|plant]] and [[Animal Manipulation|animal]] life to possibly even [[Abstract Existence|abstract forces]] and [[Conceptual Manipulation|concepts]].

It is important to note that just causing death via other abilities or indirect means (such as [[Soul Manipulation|soul destruction]], physical damage, [[Deconstruction|deconstruction]] etc.) in itself does not qualify for Death Manipulation unless it is specified or portrayed to be a direct inducement of death in its targets with these being aftereffects of that.

==Users==
* [[The Lich]] and [[GOLB]] ([[Adventure Time]])
* [[The Death Note]] ([[Death Note]])
* [[Zeref Dragneel]] ([[Fairy Tail]])
* [[Voldemort]] and others with the Killing Curse ([[Wizarding World]])
* [[Yuyuko Saigyouji]] ([[Touhou Project]])
